title: In farewell message for RS members, PM praises Kharge, Deve Gowda and Pawar: 'Newly elected MPs should learn from them'
description: PM Modi bids farewell to 59 retiring Rajya Sabha members, urging them to stay engaged in national life. He emphasises the importance of experience and dedication, particularly highlighting the contributions of stalwarts like Kharge, Gowda, and Pawar.
